name: Greet by name
description: Mac starter script. Opens TextEdit with a fresh blank document and types a greeting in your name.

actions.script:
tell application "TextEdit"
  activate
  make new document
end tell
actions.label: open TextEdit with a fresh blank document (skips the iCloud file picker that TextEdit shows on launch)
let the new doc window come to the front and grab focus

actions.text: Hello {{name}} — this was written by WillettBot.
